title: Rich Nostalgic Saudia Basmati Rice Stir-fry
description: A rich and nostalgic saudi arabian dish featuring crispy basmati rice with a blend of aromatic spices including bhuna for a flavorful twist, suitable for those on a paleo diet.

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons olive oil or coconut oil

instructions: Rinse the basmati rice under cold water and drain well.
In a large skillet, heat olive oil or coconut oil over medium-high heat. Add minced garlic and bhuna paste, cooking until fragrant (about 1 minute).
Stir in rinsed and drained basmati rice, tossing to coat the grains evenly with the spices. Cook for about 5 minutes or until all water has been absorbed.
Add a pinch of salt and stir gently. Serve hot with fresh cilantro leaves as garnish.
